---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Something broke while installing or running DATBOI
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Before filing:** run `./datboi doctor` and paste its output below — it catches most
setup issues (Python version, missing deps, keys, port) and often points right at the fix.

### What happened

```
paste here
```

- `python3 --version`:
- Installed deps? (`pip install -r requirements.txt` succeeded?): yes / no

paste any traceback or terminal output (REDACT any keys — never paste your .env or wallet)
